film.title: Devaki
film.overview: Devaki takes a look at the parallel lives of two young women, belonging to strikingly different backgrounds, who were both betrayed by their fathers and lovers.

dialogues.dialogue: ...let me see you properly. Take off your clothes. Weren't you ashamed when you used... ...to roam around the whole village? I am too seasoned to your wiles.
I went closer. And I saw that they... sir... were naked and making love. What to say, sir. We were shamed to see them. If she had been my daughter, then... ...I would have cut her into pieces.
A little while back she was screwing your client... ...to get you a massive order. Are you proud of me, daddy? You... you... Hey! What's with you, guys!
